generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor in the thermal incubator system"
]

instance ControlStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for monitoring control states in the incubator system"
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance ControlStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControlStateSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from the incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance ControlStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current control state data from the incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControlStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler
]

instance ThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for thermal dynamics of the incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicsSimulation, CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance CyberPhysicalSystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Integrated model of the physical and computational components of the incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PhysicsSimulation, CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data transmission between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance CADTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design tool for geometric modeling of the incubator components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance PhysicsSimulation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Physics simulation engine using differential equations for thermal dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Network of sensors for real-time data acquisition in the incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for calibrating model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting anomalies in temperature data and model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating internal states of the incubator system using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing thermal control parameters to achieve energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring of system safety and performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected, StateEstimated
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating incubator behavior under various conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedTemperature
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing system parameters to improve operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedParameters
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for controlling the incubator based on detected violations"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustTemperature
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indication of a fault in the thermal system based on sensor and model analysis"
]

instance StateEstimated : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated internal temperature state of the incubator system"
]

instance PredictedTemperature : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature trajectory under current conditions"
]

instance OptimizedParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized control parameters for thermal regulation"
]

instance AdjustTemperature : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of heatbed temperature to correct deviations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubator : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory environment for biological sample storage requiring precise thermal control"
    base:contains Heatbed, EmbeddedController, CommunicationSoftware, SimulationModels
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Heating element of the thermal incubator system"
]

instance EmbeddedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded system controlling the heatbed temperature based on control signals"
]

instance CommunicationSoftware : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Software handling communication between physical components and digital twin"
]

instance SimulationModels : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Collection of computational models used in the digital twin"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller on the Raspberry Pi listens to RabbitMQ for commands to control the fan and heatbed, issuing heating signals to activate the heatbed. Command execution is confirmed, though validation, authentication, feedback, and conflict resolution mechanisms are not specified."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through calibration algorithms that adjust parameters using sensor data, with validation via monitoring systems that check safety and operational optimality. Error detection mechanisms identify violations, triggering corrective actions by humans or algorithms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system utilizes a 1-Wire bus for sensor connectivity and a RabbitMQ server for synchronization and communication. The deployment includes a Raspberry Pi hosting RabbitMQ, though network topology, bandwidth, latency, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server is hosted on a Raspberry Pi, indicating on-premise edge deployment. RabbitMQ supports deployment on premises and in the cloud, though computational requirements, storage specifics, scalability mechanisms, and availability assurances are not provided."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs monitoring mechanisms to continuously assess the Physical Twin's safety and operational optimality. When violations are detected, human operators or automated algorithms initiate corrective actions to the Physical Twin to maintain system integrity."
]
